source: asOf 12 Jul 2026 — LIVE PULL OK (Claude in Chrome). Review sheet 'NYC Property Review — Guignot' read first: 21 rows (up from 20) — one new triage applied: 125 East 81st Street New → Shortlist; notes column still empty; no decisions.json fallback present. Full live StreetEasy sweep: UES 4-bed (11 results / 11 unique after de-duping the SE featured double-cards for 170 E 87th #E20B and 165 E 66th #19A) + UES 5-bed (7 unique); downtown via the All-Downtown region pull, 4+ beds (8 unique: SoHo 3, Tribeca 2, West Village 2, East Village 1; Chelsea/Flatiron/Gramercy/Greenwich Village 0). Findings: 0 genuinely NEW addresses and 0 price drops — every live listing already in the store. 21 E 84th #TH holds at $34,000 (the 9 Jul cut) and 300 E 79th #PHCD at $35,000 (the 1 Jul cut) — both now carry a '$5,000' reduced badge on SE, consistent with the already-logged drops, not new cuts. 353 Sixth Ave stays a single Rove listing (#3, $37,000) — the known wobble, not a drop. No removals. Carry-over New items 144 Waverly #1G + 366 Broadway #9A re-confirmed live, still awaiting sheet triage (add-to-sheet). 126 East 62nd #2 absent again from the UES 4-bed pull (7th run running; kept Maybe, verify with agent). Off-market carry-overs unchanged (525 Park, 920 Park #15C, 1085 Park, 218 E 79th, 440 W 20th). Open houses: 235 E 72nd TODAY Sun Jul 12 (12–1 PM); 145 Spring #PH Mon Jul 13 (10:30 AM–5:30 PM); 422 E 72nd #32DE + 544 E 86th #PHE both Tue Jul 14. Data hygiene: a duplicate 125 East 81st Street row (introduced by a stale build script) was removed this run — store is back to one row per address. Slack: SILENT (0 new, 0 price drops). Counts: 18 Rejected / 5 Unavailable / 8 Shortlist / 8 Maybe / 2 New (41 listings).
